hero.description: Testara explores your website, generates tailored test scenarios, automatically executes them, and provides precise reports — guided by an AI agent at every step.

features.title: Everything your QA team needs
features.subtitle: From exploration to reporting — one platform, one agent, zero configuration

exploration.title: Smart Exploration
exploration.description: The agent automatically maps all pages, interactions, user flows, and roles. Zero effort from your side.

scenarios.title: AI Scenario Generation
scenarios.description: Describe what to test: Get ready-to-run scenarios.

execution.title: Automated Execution
execution.description: Tests run on QA, UAT, or PROD. Real-time result streaming with retry logic and recap.

security.title: Security Audit
security.description: OWASP Top 10 checks, JWT analysis, SQL injection probing, and dependency CVE analysis.

reports.title: Custom Reports
reports.description: Each report is specific to your test type — Performance, E2E, Security, or UI/UX.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Invite members, assign roles, and share reports with links. Built for QA teams of all sizes.

process.title: Four phases, fully guided
process.subtitle: The agent guides you through each step — asking for your input exactly at the right moment

step1.title: Explore and Understand
step1.description: Paste your URL. The agent maps every page, every click, and every user flow — building a complete context model of your application.

step2.title: Generate Scenarios
step2.description: Choose a test type — E2E, Security, Performance, or UI/UX. The agent generates tailored and validated tests.

step3.title: Execute and Fix
step3.description: Watch tests run in real-time. When failures occur, the agent analyzes, suggests fixes, and automatically retries.

step4.title: Custom Reports
step4.description: Get a report built for your test type — with relevant metrics, comparisons, and actionable recommendations.

cta.title: Test your application now
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of teams that trust AI-powered tests to ship faster with confidence.

testimonials.title: Experiences Shared by Our Clients
testimonials.review1: As a long-time user of WDK AI ToolKit, I can confidently say that their solutions have revolutionised the way we operate.
testimonials.review2: Testara has completely transformed our QA workflow. The AI agent catches bugs we never would have found manually.
testimonials.review3: The automated test generation saved our team hundreds of hours. The reports are incredibly detailed and actionable.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.subtitle: Still have doubts? More questions? This might help!

q1.question: What is Webflow and why is it the best website builder?
q1.answer: Webflow is a powerful visual development platform that allows designers to create fully responsive websites without writing a single line of code. It combines code flexibility with a visual editor's simplicity.

q2.question: What is your preferred model among BRIX models?
q2.answer: We recommend starting with our Enterprise model which offers the best value-to-features ratio for QA teams.

q3.question: How to clone a Webflow template from the showcase?
q3.answer: Visit our showcase, select the desired template, then click the 'Clone' button to add it to your Webflow dashboard.

q4.question: Why is BRIX Templates the best Webflow agency?
q4.answer: Our team combines technical expertise and creative design to deliver web solutions that exceed our clients' expectations.

workspace.crawlingSubtitle: The agent is mapping every page, link, and user flow

agent.title: AI Helper
agent.subtitle: Waiting for your response...
agent.greeting: Hi! I'll explore your site to map all pages and user flows.
agent.askScope: Should I explore only public pages, or also authenticated areas?
agent.confirmStart: Perfect. Can I start the exploration now?
agent.inProgress: Exploration running — mapping pages and detecting flows...
agent.doneSummary: I found 20 pages and 5 user flows. Would you like to re-run the crawl with deeper coverage?
